# JOJOCAFE source-7400 Coverage

Compared against `https://github.com/JOJOCAFE/ice-chips-verilog/tree/main/source-7400` at commit `07242b34b1d5e603576398a9b82167b374500dc4`.

These future-use models were added because the upstream source-7400 library had matching 74xx parts not yet present in this shared 74HC folder. They are logic models only; add manufacturer-verified DIP pin files when a project needs physical wiring for one of them.

| Upstream file | Shared HC file | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `7407.v` | `74hc07.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `7410.v` | `74hc10.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `7411.v` | `74hc11.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `74112.v` | `74hc112.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `74147.v` | `74hc147.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `74148.v` | `74hc148.v` | Added from JOJOCAFE upstream source-7400 |
| `74150.v` | - | Skipped: no manufacturer-verified 74HC150 DIP source |
